title: A Different Take on LILIN
wikitext:
[]: A Different Take on LILIN+?             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jan 09, 2008 3:18 pm A few days ago, I had a thought that I've been meaning to put out. When seeing the phrase "LILIN+?" flash on the screen, the first instinct is to think of it as "THIS MIGHT BE A LILIN+" or something to that effect. In fact, "LILIN+" has become one of the ranks on this forum. However, it is also possible that the phrase means "LILIN AND ALSO SOMETHING ELSE THAT WE DON'T KNOW WHAT IT IS". In other words, a Lilin and also an unrevealed entity in one.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Wed Jan 09, 2008 5:22 pm that makes sense possible third entity thrown in with Adam and Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jan 09, 2008 5:56 pm The only other Biblical progenitor is Sammael, as Reichu pointed out during a previous discussion. Unlike Adam and Ev(e/a), however, Sammael was the only one of the three to truly be an Angel in Biblical canon.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Wed Jan 09, 2008 6:37 pm May I know where this comes from? And preffeably with media?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jan 09, 2008 8:15 pm Where what comes from?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Jan 09, 2008 8:47 pm http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=145565#145565 This? If I'm reading this right, this is from a fanfic, and that means...NAveryW!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jan 09, 2008 8:49 pm Eh? No, I didn't write that as part of a fanfic. That's from a comic called I Feel Sick by Jhonen Vaskezupeldoqueezy. Neon Phthora EVANGALIEN is the only fanfiction I've written since I was ten.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Jan 09, 2008 8:51 pm Is the fanfic your source for this? I see a lot of bizarro stuff on the internet that is not verifiable. Where did you get that from, or which discussion did Reichu mention it? The only recent one I found was that one.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jan 09, 2008 9:08 pm My source for what, exactly? You mean the phrase "LILIN+?"? If so, it's from the preview for Rebuild 2.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 10, 2008 12:33 am NAveryW wrote: The only other Biblical progenitor is Sammael, as Reichu pointed out during a previous discussion. Unlike Adam and Ev(e/a), however, Sammael was the only one of the three to truly be an Angel in Biblical canon.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 10, 2008 4:05 am NAveryW wrote: The only other Biblical progenitor is Sammael, as Reichu pointed out during a previous discussion.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jan 10, 2008 6:05 pm Lilith isn't part of the Biblical canon either, except one fleeting reference that is now often translated as "owl" or "demon" or something.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Jan 10, 2008 8:05 pm Lilith was supposed to be the wife of Cain, she is canon. Jeez!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jan 10, 2008 8:21 pm Her name only appears once in the current Bible, and in a place unrelated to Cain. All of the other parts with her in it have been relegated to apocrypha. This was, in a large part, due to misogynism during decisions of what was canon, and Lilith was a female with a large amount of power.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 10, 2008 8:43 pm NAveryW wrote: This was, in a large part, due to misogynism during decisions of what was canon, and Lilith was a female with a large amount of power.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jan 10, 2008 10:37 pm Reichu wrote: I'm not sure if this is really true, or a myth propagated by e.g. feminists who embrace Lilith as an archetype of sorts ("a woman who wouldn't settle for the bottom").

[]:             Quote Post by exelm » Thu Jan 10, 2008 11:14 pm First of all "Hi to everyone, this is my first post!" :) When seeing the phrase "LILIN+?" flash on the screen the first instinct is to think of it as

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jan 11, 2008 3:42 am Good point. OT: exelm, here's the proper welcome thread, be sure to say hi here! http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2&start=1960

[]: Re: A Different Take on LILIN+?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 11, 2008 1:52 pm NAveryW wrote: In fact, "LILIN+" has become one of the ranks on this forum.
